title: BlockLife
description: BlockLife are small passive creatures in the form of ores
body:
![Main Project](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8635d475eea0a4da41217a526df5a06451920e71_0.webp)

BlockLife are small, passive creatures in the shape of ores, which have a small chance of appearing when you break ores. They look like a golem topped by a block of ore and a carved pumpkin. You can also breed them by feeding them Breed Food.

_Require GeckoLib
NeoForge - 1.21.1
Forge - 1.20.1_

_BlockLife are small, passive creatures in the form of ores, which have a small chance of appearing when you break ores. And like a golem with an ore block and a carved pumpkin on top._

![coming soon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec0c1951dcacb1813a5e818461efa1c25fe42b0e_0.webp)
